channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Stella confronts Claudia over the robbery in latest The Alibi episode
item.description: In Episode 38 of the popular ABS-CBN series 'The Alibi,' Stella finally faces Claudia after a robbery incident that has caused tension and suspicion among the characters. The confrontation scene is in...

item.title: INEC Registers 93,220 New Voters in Edo State, Announces CVR Timetable
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) don announce say dem don register 93,220 new voters for Edo State ahead of the 2027 general elections. The Resident Electoral Commissioner (REC) fo...

item.title: Drone Crash in Bannu Injures Eight Civilians, Including Women
item.description: On Friday night, a serious incident took place in Bannu district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa when a quadcopter drone reportedly crashed and exploded near a residential area. The blast resulted in injuries t...

item.title: Authorities Monitor Passengers Following Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
item.description: Health officials are actively monitoring nearly 150 passengers and crew members from the Dutch-flagged MV Hondius cruise ship after a hantavirus outbreak led to three deaths. The ship, which remains o...

item.title: Federal government outlines economic zones to streamline major project approvals
item.description: The federal government of Canada has announced plans to create designated economic zones aimed at expediting the approval process for major development projects. The initiative is part of a broader se...

item.title: Historic Milton Park in Bowral undergoes $10 million renovation with room for improvement
item.description: Milton Park, a historic 1910 country estate in Bowral, Southern Highlands, has recently undergone a $10 million renovation under the new ownership of Salter Brothers, who are expanding their luxury re...

item.title: Ignition TV Covers the 2026 Renault Kiger Turbo Media Launch in South Africa
item.description: The media launch of the 2026 Renault Kiger Turbo recently took place in South Africa, and Ignition TV was on hand to cover the event. The coverage provides viewers with a detailed look at the new turb...

item.title: MV Hondius to Transfer Passengers After Hantavirus Outbreak Near Canary Islands
item.description: The MV Hondius is scheduled to arrive in the Canary Islands amid a hantavirus outbreak onboard, with authorities preparing to transfer passengers via medevac flights. CNN reporter Melissa Bell explain...

item.title: Social Media Divides Opinions on King Misuzulu's Wives
item.description: In South Africa, King Misuzulu kaZwelithini's third wife, Queen Nomzamo kaMyeni, has become the subject of intense social media scrutiny, drawing comparisons to the public divide between supporters of...

item.title: Enbridge Confident Amid Rising Oil Pipeline Competition
item.description: Calgary-based Enbridge Inc. remains confident despite increased competition from rival pipeline projects in Canada and the U.S. Colin Gruending, head of Enbridge’s liquids pipelines business, stated t...

item.title: Lateef Adedimeji and Adebimpe debunk AI-generated photos of their newborn triplets
item.description: Popular Nollywood actor Lateef Adedimeji and him wife, Adebimpe Oyebade, don come out clearly to address the viral baby pictures wey dey circulate online, saying the images no be their real children. ...

item.title: Guide to Stylish and Easy-to-Maintain Zig Zag Hairstyles for Natural Hair

item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) in KwaZulu-Natal is set to hold its provincial congress this weekend, where delegates will elect a new leadership team amid growing pressure to strengthen the party's posi...

item.title: Brockville teen charged with first-degree murder in deaths of mother and two daughters
item.description: Police in Brockville, Ont., have charged a 17-year-old with three counts of first-degree murder after three people were found dead inside a home on Cartier Court on Thursday. According to police and c...

item.title: APC Denies Benjamin Kalu Endorsed Governor Alex Otti for 2027 Re-election
item.description: The Abia State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) don reject any talk say Deputy Speaker of the House of Representatives, Benjamin Kalu, don endorse Governor Alex Otti for 2027 re-election...

item.title: Mac Allister’s Father Confirms Liverpool Has Not Started Contract Renewal Talks

item.description: The National Police Service (NPS) has taken swift action following a viral video showing a male police officer verbally abusing a female traffic officer during a traffic enforcement encounter in Nakur...

item.title: Cottesloe Tops WA’s Luxury Property Market with Double-Digit Growth
item.description: Cottesloe has once again claimed the top spot as the most expensive suburb for luxury homes in Western Australia, according to Ray White Group Australia’s latest Luxury Outlook report. The median hous...
